ssmcontacts.contact.channeltargetinfo.Cf: Information about the contact channel that Incident Manager uses to engage the contact.

ssmcontacts.contact.channeltargetinfo.Ch.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the contact channel.

ssmcontacts.contact.channeltargetinfo.Re.Description: The number of minutes to wait before retrying to send engagement if the engagement initially failed.
